# Universe Design - React

[![@universe-design/react bnpm version](https://web-bnpm.byted.org/badge/v/@universe-design/react.svg)](https://web-bnpm.byted.org/package/@universe-design/react)
[![@universe-design/react bnpm downloads](https://web-bnpm.byted.org/badge/d/@universe-design/react.svg)](https://web-bnpm.byted.org/package/@universe-design/react)

## 快速接入

```bash
#  npm
npm i @universe-design/react
#  yarn
yarn add @universe-design/react
#  pnpm
pnpm add @universe-design/react
```

```tsx
// 在任意使用组件的场所，按需加载需要的组件即可
import { Button } from '@universe-design/react';

function App() {
  return <Button>Hello Universe!</Button>;
}
```
